{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323005258F943442018B27BF3C889"}"},"total":57},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7599494533025989400","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我觉得本书的亮点是，在对主角及其他人物的塑造方面，与主角的金手指及情节的后续发展没有冲突，以至阅读流畅。因为我在番茄见过很多小说，起点很好，开的也很大，但后续因为各种原因内容直接崩掉了。这点作者做的不错，加油加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769397967,"group_id":"7594141429773896728","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"过去、现在、未来，皆一番通途。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyUFmPzdzPu52rRPbMofYxTUE1UX6YVgIKAlyi+f4LGJ","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c5b742ca0c654756ba5ab56b6e97afb8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790430&x-signature=1y7aCqjH5bs2Z7f9X87EiWswMtc%3D","user_id":"1496877146053660","user_name":"猫无畏"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1496877146053660","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7594141429773896728","book_info":{"abstract":"陆渊穿越修仙界，成为一个资质平平的路人甲，却觉醒了一个人气系统。
他尝试了许多提升人气的方法，皆以无效告终。
直到有一次做任务回来，路遇外门女弟子被欺凌，陆渊前去帮助。
他突然发现，眼前能够看到一条条飘过的弹幕。
他方才知晓，自己似乎成了仙侠剧中的路人甲，而他通过和女主接触，增加自身曝光率，提升人气，再通过人气系统变强。
通过人气系统，陆渊将普普通通的灵根提升为极品灵根、天品灵根……大道灵根。
残缺的功法，可以通过系统修复，低级的功法，可以通过系统升级。
神兵利器，或修复、或升级。
各种丹药，应有尽有。
为了获得更多的人气，陆渊开始通过弹幕剧透的内容做出改变。
一开始是为了人气，但不知不觉中，陆渊发现自己这个师妹好像赖上自己了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9584c874587d6751da7fb68e284d56ba","author":"青狸哭血","author_id":"","book_id":"7594141429773896728","book_name":"仙侠剧路人甲，我靠人气夺走女主","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#384060","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4969人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7594141468080472600","read_count":"4969","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"241865"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.0","serial_count":"111","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,直播,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oc64c52c73ba35b0d73f0c8a54f6f9ade~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779382378&x-signature=VZviz5GUwjkziIwpz3meMECeYo0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110738656740","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"54"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323005258F943442018B27BF3C889"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"li
